ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or sizing standard (e.g., US, UK, EU, Asian) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "clothing_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "asian_size" INTEGER /* Asian size equivalent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size entry
Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L)
Region or sizing standard (e.g., US, UK, EU, Asian)
Type of clothing (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses)
Timestamp when the size chart was created
Timestamp when the size chart was last updated
